design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title+kind+audience+generated_at → selected architecture=workflow-command-center; AIDA Check: hero=Attention, proof=bento+sources=Interest, media+motion=Desire, CTA band=Action; Font Selection: Outfit; Hero Math Verification: clamp headline 44–72px, max-width 1100px ensures 2–3 lines; Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present; GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics; Label Sweep & Button Check: primary CTA black pill to app.getsupers.com/general?login=1&open_login=1, secondary white pill.
headline: Order food with AI — a personal agent that handles delivery apps for you

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to order meals, groceries, and delivery without babysitting apps
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Order food with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
queries: computer use AI agent ordering food
site_brief.title: Order food with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can coordinate food ordering across delivery apps, preferences, addresses, payment confirmation, and repeat orders

summary: A practical, long‑form field guide showing how Super can act as a personal AI agent to order meals and groceries across delivery apps using real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache, with clear steps, limits, and confirmation points.
